ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "gp" TEXT /* Galactic Power (GP) of the character */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Current star level of the character */,
  "current_gear" INTEGER /* Current gear level of the character */,
  "gear_needed" INTEGER /* Number of gear pieces needed to fully optimize the character */,
  "zetas" TEXT /* Current zeta abilities of the character */,
  "synergy_bonus" REAL /* Synergy bonus provided by the character to the team */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of the character (e.g., hero, villain) */,
  "character_role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the team (e.g., attacker, defender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gear_pieces" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gear piece */,
  "gear_name" TEXT /* Name of the gear piece */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of the gear piece (e.g., Weapon, Armor) */,
  "gear_stat" TEXT /* Primary stat of the gear piece (e.g., Health, Attack, Defense) */,
  "gear_slot" TEXT /* Slot where the gear piece is equipped (e.g., Head, Body, Legs) */,
  "gear_level" INTEGER /* Level of the gear piece */,
  "gear_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the gear piece (e.g., +10% Health, +5% Attack) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_gear" (
  "character_gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-gear relationship */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gear piece */,
  "gear_level" INTEGER /* Level of the equipped gear piece */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date when the gear piece was equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_gear_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_gear_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_gear_gear_id FOREIGN KEY ("gear_id") REFERENCES gear_pieces ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zeta_abilities" (
  "zeta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zeta ability */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the zeta ability */,
  "ability_description" TEXT /* Description of the zeta ability */,
  "ability_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the zeta ability (e.g., +20% Attack, +15% Defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zeta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zeta_abilities_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the character data */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was recorded */,
  "gp" TEXT /* Galactic Power (GP) of the character */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Current star level of the character */,
  "current_gear" INTEGER /* Current gear level of the character */,
  "gear_needed" INTEGER /* Number of gear pieces needed to fully optimize the character */,
  "zetas" TEXT /* Current zeta abilities of the character */,
  "synergy_bonus" REAL /* Synergy bonus provided by the character to the team */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of the character (e.g., hero, villain) */,
  "character_role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the team (e.g., attacker, defender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_versions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, community manager, player) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, basic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the character */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization recommendation */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "recommended_gear" TEXT /* Recommended gear pieces for optimization */,
  "recommended_abilities" TEXT /* Recommended abilities for optimization */,
  "optimization_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the optimization recommendation */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the optimization recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_optimization_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_builds" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team build */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team build */,
  "character_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of character IDs in the team */,
  "build_description" TEXT /* Description of the team build */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team build (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_builds_character_ids FOREIGN KEY ("character_ids") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., gear upgrade, star gain) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_history_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical data point */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical data point (e.g., win rate, opponent win rate) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistical data point */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistical data point was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
